name: JBS S.A.
description: JBS S.A. is a Brazilian multinational company and the world's largest meat processing enterprise. The company specializes in the production and processing of beef, chicken, pork, and lamb, while also managing a diverse portfolio of value-added food products and by-products. With a global footprint, JBS operates extensive production facilities and distribution networks across several continents, serving customers in over 190 countries. The company is committed to sustainable food production and innovation, continuously expanding its reach through strategic acquisitions and a focus on operational efficiency in the global protein market.
